reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger role separation, clearer deployment boundaries, and lower promotional drift.
strengths: The article now treats radar and RF as different evidence sources rather than as simplified competitors.
It clearly explains when RF adds real value and when a radar-first design remains necessary.
The procurement guidance is practical and avoids flattening the comparison into a marketing-style winner declaration.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable under the stricter rubric. It is more specific, more operationally useful, and more technically honest than the earlier draft.
